channel.title: Microsoft Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Microsoft Corporation (microsoft).

item.title: CVE-2026-47294 · 8 HIGH — Microsoft SharePoint Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-23663 · 7.5 HIGH ☁️ — Microsoft Global Secure Access (GSA) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Improper privilege management in Azure Entra ID allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42901 · 10 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft Entra ID Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Origin validation error in Microsoft Entra ID allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41104 · 10 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft Planetary Computer Pro Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data in Microsoft Planetary Computer Pro allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-45659 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft SharePoint Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-33843 · 9.1 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft Azure Active Directory B2C Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Authentication bypass using an alternate path or channel in Microsoft Azure Active Directory B2C allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-26147 · 7.7 HIGH ☁️ — Azure Stack HCI Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Improper input validation in Azure Compute Gallery allows an authorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41090 · 9.3 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft Copilot Tampering Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in a command ('command injection') in Microsoft Copilot allows an unauthorized attacker to perform tampering over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42827 · 6.5 MEDIUM ☁️ — M365 Copilot Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in a command ('command injection') in M365 Copilot allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47280 · 10 CRITICAL ☁️ — Azure Resource Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper authentication in Azure Resource Manager (ARM) allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-40411 · 9.9 CRITICAL ☁️ — Azure Virtual Network Gateway Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Improper input validation in Azure Virtual Network Gateway allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-35430 · 8.8 HIGH ☁️ — Azure Privileged Identity Management (PIM) Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Authorization bypass through user-controlled key in Azure Privileged Identity Management (PIM) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-23652 · 10 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft Power Pages Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in a command ('command injection') in Microsoft Power Pages allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-40412 · 10 CRITICAL ☁️ — Azure Orbital Spatio Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type in Azure Orbital Spatio allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42834 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Admin Center in Azure Portal Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Windows Admin Center allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-45584 · 8.1 HIGH — Microsoft Defender Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Defender allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41091 · 7.8 HIGH 💥 — Microsoft Defender Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in Microsoft Defender allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-45498 · 4 MEDIUM 💥 — Microsoft Defender Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Defender Denial of Service Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-45585 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Windows BitLocker Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft is aware of a security feature bypass vulnerability in Windows publicly referred to as "YellowKey". The proof of concept for this vulnerability has been made public violating coordinated vulnerability best practices. We are issuin…

item.title: CVE-2026-42822 · 10 CRITICAL — Azure Local Disconnected Operations (ALDO) Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper authentication in Azure Local Disconnected Operations allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-45495 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-45494 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-45492 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Improper input validation in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41615 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Microsoft Authenticator Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor in Microsoft Authenticator allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42897 · 8.1 HIGH 💥 — Microsoft Exchange Server Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Exchange Server allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-33821 · 7.7 HIGH ☁️ — Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Insights Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper privilege management in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Insights allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42893 · 7.4 HIGH — Microsoft Outlook for iOS Tampering Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in a command ('command injection') in M365 Copilot allows an unauthorized attacker to perform tampering over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42838 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements in output used by a downstream component ('injection') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-40416 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) for Android Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: User interface (ui) misrepresentation of critical information in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42833 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Microsoft Dynamics 365 On-Premises Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Improper control of generation of code ('code injection') in Microsoft Dynamics 365 (on-premises) allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42832 · 7.7 HIGH — Microsoft Office Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Microsoft Office allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42830 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Azure Monitor Agent Metrics Extension Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Untrusted search path in Azure Monitor Agent allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42823 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Azure Logic Apps Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Azure Logic Apps allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41613 · 8.8 HIGH — Visual Studio Code Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Session fixation in Visual Studio Code allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41103 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Microsoft SSO Plugin for Jira & Confluence Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect implementation of authentication algorithm in Microsoft SSO Plugin for Jira & Confluence allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-40381 · 7.8 HIGH — Azure Connected Machine Agent Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Azure Connected Machine Agent allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-41097 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Secure Boot Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Reliance on a component that is not updateable in Windows Secure Boot allows an authorized attacker to bypass a security feature locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-41086 · 8.8 HIGH — Windows Admin Center in Azure Portal Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Windows Admin Center allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-40420 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft Office Click-To-Run Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Office allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-35436 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft Office Click-To-Run Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Office allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40418 · 7.8 HIGH — Microsoft Office Click-To-Run Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Office allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40413 · 7.4 HIGH — Windows TCP/IP Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Windows TCP/IP Denial of Service Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-40403 · 8.8 HIGH — Windows Graphics Component Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows Win32K - GRFX allows an authorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40402 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Windows Hyper-V Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Hyper-V allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40401 · 7.1 HIGH — Windows TCP/IP Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Windows TCP/IP Denial of Service Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-40398 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Remote Desktop Services Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows Remote Desktop allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-32209 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Windows Filtering Platform (WFP) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Windows Filtering Platform (WFP) allows an authorized attacker to bypass a security feature locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40397 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Common Log File System Driver Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows Common Log File System Driver allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40382 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Telephony Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Telephony Service allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-40369 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows Kernel allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
